case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA, VS. BRIAN J. WILLIAMS et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
DECLARATION ERICA L. BRACHFELD FILED RE: CCP 1033B(1)&(2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT -CAUSE OF ACTION-BREACH OF CONTRACT AS TO COMPLAINT AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS- AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCL.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, BRIAN J. $2,635.80 PRINCIPAL, $394.28 INTEREST, $267.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,297.08, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE: SUMMONS; COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
